pageContext.name: The Batman Special Art Edition (Limited Version)
pageContext.description: 'I'm Vengeance. – The Batman  Debuted quickly after this year's mind-blowing DC Fandome trailer, comes this exciting release for Prime 1 Studio. We are incredibly proud to present the unbelievable 1:3 Scale THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue from THE BATMAN!  At almost 35 inches tall, Prime 1 Studio's 1:3 Scale Museum Masterline THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue is based on Jim Lee's breathtaking DC Fandome illustration from 2020's DC Fandome Event. Prime 1 Studio created this work of art to take advantage of every opportunity to showcase this newest Batman and to shine a spotlight on how awesome this new design aesthetic is.  Prime 1 Studio's artist team took the kernel of Jim Lee's artwork and embellished it to push the realism and drama. Inspired by the film, our artists have pushed the boundaries of what's possible to bring you an exciting take on the Caped Crusader.  This Limited Version comes with more surprises for your displaying pleasure! More than one portrait, the Limited Version will come with three (3) unique, swappable portraits in total. While one is directly inspired by Jim Lee's art, one portrait is an homage to the upcoming film and the other portrait will be a callback to a more comic-based appearance. Moreover, it comes with two (2) swappable Left Hands and three (3) Swappable Right Hands to allow you to extend your storytelling! Also possesses an added element of drama: Our skillful Prime 1 Studio tailors have equipped this fearsome statue with an equally emotive, poseable Fabric Cape! Adjust the posing of this Fabric Cape to bring out the most expressive pose yet!  Perched atop an iconic gargoyle, THE BATMAN is ready to take on Gotham City's most superstitious, and cowardly lot. And the best news? THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue is also ready to occupy your very own shelf! Add him to your DC Comics collection today!
